description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with an extremely abstract and distorted form, featuring elongated limbs and exaggerated, angular body parts. The figure's legs and arms are stretched and twisted, with one arm appearing much longer and bent at an unnatural angle. The torso is sharply faceted, with a mix of jagged and smooth surfaces, and the head is barely distinguishable from the rest of the body. The color palette is bold, with prominent black, red, blue, and some brownish tones distributed unevenly across the figure. The overall appearance is highly stylized, lacking realistic anatomical proportions, and the surface finish appears smooth and hard. The object does not display any visible accessories or carried items.
description: A highly abstract, elongated adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated limbs and angular, faceted surfaces in bold black, red, and blue tones.
description_view_0: The lower body and legs are most prominent, with one leg straight and the other bent, and the angular torso and arm details are visible.
description_view_1: The figure's elongated arm and side profile are highlighted, showing the extreme stretch and angularity of the limbs.
description_view_2: The back and upper body are visible, with the sharp, faceted torso and both arms extending outward.
description_view_3: A side view emphasizing the length and twist of the limbs, with the figure's angular structure and posture clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, form-fitting garment with no discernible style or accessories
attribute_hairstyle: indistinct, abstract head shape with no visible hairstyle
